Name: Super Credit & Rare Sample Arrows
Description: Blue arrows mark Super Credits, purple arrows mark Rare Samples. Pick one, or Both.

Options.Name: Arrow
Options.Description: Blue = Super Credits, Purple = Rare Samples. Choose one or Both.

SubOptions.Name: Blue - Super Credits (no glow)
SubOptions.Description: Blue arrows over Super Credits, no glow.

SubOptions.Name: Purple - Rare Samples
SubOptions.Description: Purple arrows over Rare Samples (E-710 Crystal, Black Saffron, Legendarium).

SubOptions.Name: Both - Credits + Rare Samples
SubOptions.Description: Blue on Super Credits AND purple on Rare Samples.
